pins.evaluation_source: published Tülu 3.1 model card and Tülu 3 primary paper

stage_decisions.reason: Creates the assistant-format/task starting policy and released checkpoint.
stage_decisions.cost_evidence: 64 H100 GPUs in the documented 8B reproduction topology; exact monetary cost not published.

stage_decisions.reason: +4.0 reported average and large IF/MATH gains versus SFT in matched columns
stage_decisions.rollback: retain SFT checkpoint and re-evaluate safety mixture

stage_decisions.reason: Tülu 3.1 reaches 66.3 average, 47.8 MATH, 90.0 GSM8K, and 83.9 IFEval
stage_decisions.regression: safety falls to 81.2; HumanEval pass@10 is 84.8 versus 86.2 at SFT
stage_decisions.rollback: ship DPO or earlier RLVR checkpoint if deployment safety gate fails

runtime_boundary: Tool credentials, authorization, confirmation, monitoring, receipts, and rollback remain application controls.
